assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and a terminal with cURL.
No prior account, API key, or successful API request exists yet.

developer_goal: Create a Together account, add a payment method, purchase at least $5 of prepaid credits, obtain an API key, and complete a chat-completions request over HTTPS.

first_success.outcome: POST https://api.together.ai/v1/chat/completions with a Bearer key returns chat-completion output after a minimum $5 prepaid credit purchase.
first_success.observable_signal: The HTTP response body includes assistant message content for the requested prompt.

route_selection.surface: Together Quickstart via cURL chat completions (prepaid credits)
route_selection.rule: Prefer the shortest complete path that reaches an authenticated API response without requiring an SDK when cURL is documented.
route_selection.selected: Together Quickstart via cURL chat completions (prepaid credits)

candidates.name: Together Quickstart via cURL chat completions (prepaid credits)
candidates.reason: Together's Quickstart documents a cURL POST to https://api.together.ai/v1/chat/completions with Authorization: Bearer $TOGETHER_API_KEY. The billing credits guide states Together does not offer a free trial, requires a minimum $5 credit pur

candidates.name: SDK-first quickstart tab
candidates.reason: SDK install is optional when official docs document an equivalent cURL call.

required_path.action: Open the Together Quickstart and follow Register for an account.
Choose Google or GitHub and complete that provider's OAuth sign-in.
required_path.observable_result: An organization with a Default Project is available.

required_path.action: Confirm the account organization and included Default Project.
Create a named project API key, copy it immediately, and store it securely.
required_path.observable_result: The key value is saved locally.
TOGETHER_API_KEY is set in the current shell.

required_path.action: Add a supported payment method and purchase at least $5 of prepaid credits.
required_path.observable_result: Billing shows a usable credit balance of at least the purchased amount.

required_path.action: POST a chat-completions request with cURL to https://api.together.ai/v1/chat/completions.
required_path.observable_result: The API returns a successful JSON body containing assistant message content.

required_path.action: Confirm the chat-completions JSON includes assistant message content.
required_path.observable_result: Assistant content is present in the successful response.

prerequisites.description: A Together account created through the documented Google or GitHub signup route, with an organization and Default Project.
A supported payment method as the default, plus at least $5 of prepaid credits and a positive usable balance. Together documents no free trial and fully prepaid access.
A project API key created in the Default Project, copied immediately, and exported as TOGETHER_API_KEY.
A terminal with cURL (or any HTTP client). No language SDK is required.

external_gates.description: Google and GitHub are peer OAuth signup providers.
The project key is displayed only once and must be saved immediately.
A supported payment method is required; bank or provider verification can delay readiness.
There is no free trial; at least $5 of prepaid credits and a positive balance are required before API usage.
A credit purchase can remain pending for up to 15 minutes before the balance updates.

platform_outcomes.description: POST https://api.together.ai/v1/chat/completions with a Bearer key returns chat-completion output after a minimum $5 prepaid credit purchase.

excluded.reason: Official docs document an equivalent cURL call.

sources.title: Payment methods and invoices
evidence_supported: Add and default a payment method

sources.title: Billing troubleshooting
evidence_supported: Up to 15 minute credit balance update wait

uncertainties.question: Exact card brands and regional payment-method exclusions for the default payment method.
uncertainties.impact: Could block credit purchase for some payment instruments.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Payment-methods docs list supported methods at a high level without a exhaustive regional matrix on the researched pages.
